title: cirsium × woronowii
intro: Cirsium × woronowii, also known as Wolley-Dod's thistle, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cirsium × woronowii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of this plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a valuable addition to natural remedies.
